item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-031","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The response stays routed to a concrete release/code review audit: it asks for the release diff, patch, release notes, source directories, or commit range, and says it will report high-risk issues, file/line evidence, impact, tests, and pre-release checks. It does not trigger a generic TVG/product-strengthening loop from the word “audit.”"}
